Pxlkit Contributor License Terms
================================

By submitting a contribution to this repository, you represent that you have the right to
submit it and agree to the following:

- code contributions may be used, modified, and distributed under the repository's MIT code license (`LICENSE-CODE`);
- icon, artwork, and visual-asset contributions may be used, modified, and distributed under
  the repository's asset and commercial terms (`LICENSE-ASSETS` and `COMMERCIAL_TERMS`);
- the maintainers may repackage and redistribute accepted contributions as part of the Pxlkit
  repository, website, npm packages, and commercial asset offerings; and
- you are not submitting material that knowingly infringes third-party rights.

If you do not agree with these terms, do not submit the contribution.
